name: Sweet'n Sour Ham Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the brown sugar, mustard, and vinegar in a bowl; set aside.
2. In another bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: ham, pork, cracker crumbs, pepper, eggs, and milk. Mix well.
3. Add half of the brown sugar mixture to the meat mixture and mix thoroughly.
4. Shape the mixture into a loaf and place it in a 10 x 6 x 1 1/2-inch baking dish.
5. Pour the remaining brown sugar mixture over the loaf.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 1/4 hours.
7. Serves 6 to 8.
Source: "Mountain Measures" --Junior League of Charleston, WV
ed. 1974
